quests.name: A Taste of the Sun
quests.giver_text: The Tavern Keeper looks weary. 'I've heard tales of a "Sun Elixir" from the Kingdom of Light. They say it can cure any fatigue. If you bring one to me, I'll make it worth your while.'
quests.log_text: Bring a Sun Elixir to the Tavern Keeper in the Hub.

quests.name: Goblin Menace
quests.giver_text: A Town Guard salutes you. 'The slums are crawling with goblins again. We're stretched thin. If you could clear out five of them, the Captain would be grateful.'
quests.log_text: Kill 5 Goblins in or near the Crossroads City.
